历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 12455 → 11210 → 12081 → 15108. Over the past three years, the ranking has generally shifted backward, with a shift of about 3027 places in 2025 compared to 2024, showing significant fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 15108. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia for science (physics category) was 19, 19, 21, and 21 students from 2022 to 2025, respectively. The 2026 plan is 21 students, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable total enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, with steadily enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a recruitment announcement that sparked public controversy. The university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, which has a mild inhibitory effect on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 76th, with a general evaluation, indicating moderate short video exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, consistent with its agricultural and forestry characteristics, and has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, which are enrolled in Ningxia, have high social popularity (Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended in 2024), while Agriculture and Mining majors have average popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Ningxia is approximately 66,000, a slight increase from about 65,897 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, and its cross-provincial enrollment in Ningxia is small (about 21 students for science), so the impact of regional preference on cross-provincial applications is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in historical rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (which attracts high-scoring candidates due to improved level), and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Ningxia, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14958, with a range of 14458 to 15458.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14458 to 15458, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Plant Production, Veterinary Medicine, Mining). Tier 1 majors like Electrical Engineering/Automation can be attempted as a reach (requires a ranking significantly better than the lower end of the range), while Tier 3 majors serve as safety options. If your ranking is better than 14458, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
